en_title: PlayStation First-Party Game Sales Have Declined Over the Past 5 Years, Although Ghost of Yotei Helped Reverse the Trend
cn_title: PlayStation第一方游戏销量五年下滑，《羊蹄山之魂》逆转颓势
subtitle: 数据不说谎
opus_summary: 在索尼关键State of Play发布会前夕，新数据显示过去五年PlayStation第一方游戏销量持续下滑，但2025年的《羊蹄山之魂》小幅逆转了趋势。索尼面临PS5涨价和PS Plus订阅费上涨后的压力，今晚的State of Play将展示Insomniac的《金刚狼》新画面。Game File记者Stephen Totilo指出，自2020年4月以来，索尼每财年第一方游戏销量减少数百万份，尽管期间有《最后生还者Part II》《对马岛之魂》《战神：诸神黄昏》等大作。2025-2026财年因《羊蹄山之魂》出现小幅回升。索尼还取消了多款游戏，包括《最后生还者》在线版和《星鸣特攻》，但《绝地潜兵2》成为史上销售最快的PlayStation Studios游戏。未来《金刚狼》和《星际：异端先知》有望提振销量。

paragraphs.en: On the eve of Sony’s crucial State of Play showcase, new data has revealed a steady decline in first-party PlayStation game sales over the past five years, although 2025's Ghost of Yotei helped reverse the trend.
paragraphs.cn: 在索尼关键State of Play发布会前夕，新数据显示过去五年PlayStation第一方游戏销量持续下滑，不过2025年的《羊蹄山之魂》帮助逆转了这一趋势。

paragraphs.en: Having increased the price of a PlayStation 5 and the cost of a PlayStation Plus subscription, Sony is under pressure to deliver with tonight’s State of Play, which we know will include a new look at Insomniac’s Wolverine game. But fans are hoping to hear more from Sony’s wide network of first-party developers at State of Play ( check out our predictions here ), many of which haven't released a brand new game in years.
paragraphs.cn: 在PS5涨价和PS Plus订阅费上涨之后，索尼面临压力，今晚的State of Play必须拿出干货。我们知道届时将展示Insomniac的《金刚狼》游戏新画面。但粉丝们希望在State of Play上听到索尼旗下众多第一方工作室的更多消息（点击此处查看我们的预测），其中许多工作室已经多年未推出全新游戏。

paragraphs.en: But it isn’t just fans who are applying pressure on Sony. Sony needs some more hit PlayStation games, data reported on by Game File’s Stephen Totilo suggests. Totilo said that Sony has sold millions fewer copies of games it’s either published or developed for PlayStation consoles each financial year since April 2020, which saw a boom in gaming due to lockdowns and the release of heavy hitters such as The Last of Us Part II and Ghost of Tsushima. Last year (April 2025 to end of March 2026) reversed the trend with a small bump fueled by Ghost of Yotei's release.
paragraphs.cn: 但给索尼施压的不只是粉丝。Game File的Stephen Totilo报道的数据显示，索尼需要更多热门PlayStation游戏。Totilo表示，自2020年4月以来，索尼每财年为其PlayStation主机发行或开发的游戏销量减少了数百万份。2020年因疫情封锁以及《最后生还者Part II》和《对马岛之魂》等重磅作品发售，游戏行业迎来繁荣。上一财年（2025年4月至2026年3月）因《羊蹄山之魂》的发售，销量出现小幅回升，逆转了趋势。

paragraphs.en: So, what has Sony actually released over the last half decade? Well, there have been some high-profile bombs, including the disastrous live-service game Concord. But it’s worth remembering that through it all, Sony has had a number of smash hits despite the overall sales figure falling. Arrowhead’s Helldivers 2, for example, remains the fastest-selling PlayStation Studios game of all time. Astro Bot might not have sold at the same level, but it was critically acclaimed. Insomniac has released Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales and Spider-Man 2, both of which have sold millions, and Sony Santa Monica released God of War Ragnarök, which was a huge hit. Polyphony released Gran Turismo 7. Guerrilla released Horizon Forbidden West. These are all major launches.
paragraphs.cn: 那么，索尼在过去五年里到底发布了哪些游戏？确实有一些高调翻车的作品，比如灾难性的服务型游戏《星鸣特攻》。但值得记住的是，尽管整体销量下滑，索尼仍然推出了不少爆款。例如Arrowhead的《绝地潜兵2》至今仍是PlayStation Studios史上销售最快的游戏。《宇宙机器人》销量可能没那么高，但获得了评论界一致好评。Insomniac推出了《漫威蜘蛛侠：迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯》和《蜘蛛侠2》，两款游戏销量均达数百万份；索尼圣莫尼卡工作室推出了大获成功的《战神：诸神黄昏》。Polyphony Digital推出了《跑车浪漫旅7》。Guerrilla推出了《地平线：西之绝境》。这些都是重磅作品。

paragraphs.en: But the data doesn’t lie. As Totilo points out, remakes and remasters, of which Sony has released a handful in recent years, haven’t closed the gap. Sony is selling fewer PlayStation Studios games on PlayStation consoles, which may have factored into its decision to pull away from PC and return to PlayStation exclusivity for its single-player narrative titles.
paragraphs.cn: 但数据不会说谎。正如Totilo指出的，索尼近年来推出的几款重制版和复刻版并未缩小差距。索尼在PlayStation主机上售出的PlayStation Studios游戏越来越少，这可能是其决定退出PC平台、让单人叙事游戏重回PlayStation独占的原因之一。

paragraphs.en: However, Sony will be happy that total PlayStation game sales, including sales of games from third-party developers and publishers, have risen in recent years. So overall, it’s a positive picture. It’s just that Sony-published games could use a shot in the arm.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，索尼应该感到欣慰的是，包括第三方开发商和发行商游戏在内的PlayStation游戏总销量近年来有所上升。所以整体来看，形势是积极的。只是索尼自家发行的游戏需要一剂强心针。

paragraphs.en: The data reinforces the idea that Sony has struggled to release new PlayStation 5 games this generation. Big new games have come out, as we've outlined, but some developers haven’t released brand new games in years. Chief among them is Naughty Dog, which is working on Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet but hasn’t released a brand new game since the aforementioned The Last of Us Part II six years ago. Gran Turismo 7 came out as a cross-gen game four years ago, and continues to receive updates, but Polyphony is due another entry in the racing game franchise. Bend Studio’s last game was 2019’s Days Gone. Media Molecule’s last game was 2020’s Dreams.
paragraphs.cn: 这些数据强化了一个观点：索尼在本世代推出新PS5游戏方面举步维艰。正如我们所述，确实有大作问世，但一些开发商已经多年未推出全新游戏。最典型的是顽皮狗，他们正在开发《星际：异端先知》，但自六年前的《最后生还者Part II》之后就没有再推出过全新游戏。《跑车浪漫旅7》作为跨世代游戏推出已有四年，仍在持续更新，但Polyphony Digital应该推出该赛车系列的新作了。Bend Studio的上一款游戏是2019年的《往日不再》。Media Molecule的上一款游戏是2020年的《梦想大创造》。

paragraphs.en: It’s impossible to point out the slowdown in sales of first-party Sony games without also talking about the many games it has canceled in recent years. Sony’s well-documented live-service game push resulted in mega hit Helldivers 2, but The Last of Us Online was canceled, Concord and its developer, Firewalk, was shut down, and a God of War live-service game from Bluepoint didn’t even make it to announcement before it fell by the wayside. Then there’s the canceled Twisted Metal live-service game, and canceled games at Sony Bend. Haven Studios' Fairgames is still officially in the works, but may have been renamed . All those canceled games have certainly left a hole in Sony’s release schedule.
paragraphs.cn: 在指出索尼第一方游戏销量放缓的同时，不能不提近年来它取消的众多游戏。索尼大张旗鼓的服务型游戏推进计划催生了爆款《绝地潜兵2》，但《最后生还者》在线版被取消，《星鸣特攻》及其开发商Firewalk被关闭，Bluepoint的一款《战神》服务型游戏甚至还没公布就夭折了。此外还有被取消的《烈火战车》服务型游戏，以及索尼Bend工作室被取消的项目。Haven Studios的《Fairgames》官方仍在开发中，但可能已经改名。所有这些被取消的游戏无疑在索尼的发售日程上留下了一个大窟窿。

paragraphs.en: Not included in the data are recently released PlayStation Studios games, such as Housemarque's Saros, although that appears to have struggled in sales terms , and Bungie's Marathon, which has also appeared to miss sales targets .
paragraphs.cn: 这些数据不包括近期发布的PlayStation Studios游戏，例如Housemarque的《沙罗周期》——该作在销量上似乎表现不佳，以及Bungie的《失落星船：马拉松》——该作似乎也未达到销售目标。

paragraphs.en: And there's reason to believe the coming years will see a futher increase in PlayStation Studios game sales. Sony will have high hopes for Marvel's Wolverine, and Naughty Dog's Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet is sure to command attention. State of Play will hopefully flesh the lineup out.
paragraphs.cn: 而且有理由相信，未来几年PlayStation Studios的游戏销量将进一步增长。索尼对《漫威金刚狼》寄予厚望，而顽皮狗的《星际：异端先知》也必将吸引大量关注。State of Play有望进一步充实游戏阵容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他。也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系Wesley。
